item.title: Ford Motor Company: FUEL SYSTEM, GASOLINE:DELIVERY:FUEL PUMP Recall (2024 ford bronco)
item.summary: Ford Motor Company (Ford) is recalling certain 2024 Bronco and Ranger vehicles. The bolts securing the high pressure fuel pump may not be tightened properly, which can result in a fuel leak.
item.affectedPeople: A fuel leak in the presence of an ignition source increases the risk of a fire.
item.remedy: Dealers will replace the high pressure fuel pump mounting bolts, free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed September 25, 2025. Owners may contact Ford customer service at 1-866-436-7332. Ford's number for this recall is 25S90.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
